name: Goblin Warrens Catalog Smoke Test
rulesText: A minimal Dungeon Deck used to test initial catalog loading, card-instance creation, shuffling, drawing, immediate trap and event resolution, Goblin reinforcement deployment, and Dungeon Discard behavior.

knownLimitations: This deck is not a complete dungeon.
This deck has no boss, dungeon objective, loot card, special room, or completion condition.
Use it only to test catalog loading and core Dungeon Deck interactions.

source.notes: First deck-definition test. Every entry quantity is intentionally equal to or below the corresponding active card definition count.
